colour() color()
Color Palette
info()
Information

Okabe and Ito's colour scheme

scale_colour_okabeito() scale_color_okabeito() scale_fill_okabeito()
Okabe and Ito's Discrete Color Scheme for ggplot2

Themed Colour Schemes

scale_colour_land() scale_color_land() scale_fill_land()
AVHRR Global Land Cover Classification Colour Scheme for ggplot2
scale_colour_soil() scale_color_soil() scale_fill_soil()
FAO Soil Reference Groups Color Scheme for ggplot2
scale_colour_stratigraphy() scale_color_stratigraphy() scale_fill_stratigraphy()
Geologic Timescale Color Scheme for ggplot2

Diagnostic Tools

compare()
Colour Difference
convert()
Simulate Colour-Blindness
plot(<colour_scheme>) plot_scheme() plot_map() plot_tiles() plot_scheme_colourblind() plot_scheme_colorblind()
Plot Color Scheme

On this page

khroma is a part of the tesselle project, a collection of packages for research and teaching in archaeology. Learn more at tesselle.org.

Developed by Nicolas Frerebeau.

Site built with pkgdown 1.9000.9000.9000.
